macro.title: Shilo AI tool turns agent calls into personalized coaching playbooks
macro.what: Shilo launched Signals, using weeks of call recordings to build DISC profiles with confidence scores and coaching recommendations.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Mortgage rates north of 6.5% trigger sharp drop in applications
macro.what: MBA reports mortgage applications fell 10.4% last week as the 30-year fixed rate rose to 6.57% and refinances fell 17%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Market Jitters Drive Mortgage Rates Up, Sending Some Would-Be Homebuyers to the Sidelines
macro.what: Higher housing costs, along with economic uncertainty that comes with the Iran war, are causing some house hunters to think twice
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Opendoor moves into closing and escrow with Doma deal, Fannie Mae partnership
housing.what: Opendoor has agreed to acquire the closing and escrow operations of Doma Holdings, a move that would extend the iBuyer’s reach into refinance closings and deeper into title automat
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: California bills target condo deposits and defect liability
housing.what: California lawmakers are weighing bills that would reduce regulatory barriers to revive condominium construction, which has dropped significantly from its peak in the years before the Great Recession
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: This $329,900 Long Island Tiny Home Is Going Viral Because It Has No Bedrooms
housing.what: A tiny home in New York is going viral on social media because it has no bedrooms
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Cleveland Remains a Beacon of Affordability for Homebuyers
housing.what: As many Americans consider buying a home this spring, they may want to take a closer look at the Cleveland metro area
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Over Half of Home Listings Have Been Lingering on the Market For More Than 2 Months
housing.what: In dollar terms, there’s $347 billion worth of stale listings in the U.S., more than ever before for this time of year
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: QXO closes on $2.25 billion Kodiak Building Partners deal
notables.what: QXO closed its $2.25B Kodiak deal, adding a $2.4B revenue platform and expanding into lumber, trusses and gypsum.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: eXp, Weichert home seller commission lawsuit settlements approved
notables.what: Judge Mark Cohen approved $44.05 million in Hooper settlements, including $34 million from eXp and $8.5 million from Weichert.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: FICO tri-merge price jumped 1,500% in four years, CHLA finds
notables.what: CHLA says per-loan credit report costs rose from about $50 in 2022 to roughly $540 in 2026 as FICO pricing increased.
notables.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
notables.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: NAR notches another legal win as three-way membership agreement antitrust suit is tossed
notables.what: Detroit judge dismissed the Hardy antitrust lawsuit over NAR three-way membership tied to Realcomp MLS, filed in August 2024.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: The proven ways real estate agents are using AI to close deals faster
notables.what: Agents and brokers are expanding AI from lead response to CRM and call coaching, as 82% of agents report using AI.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Lennar land bank exposure under the microscope
notables.what: All eyes are on Lennar’s forthcoming 10-K filing, maybe as soon as Thursday, as a wave of investor questions converges around one central issue: How much financial risk
notables.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
notables.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
